                          AREA ||i._splicer_audio_cfg||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  _splicer_audio_cfg PROC
;;;1124   
;;;1125   static VOID _splicer_audio_cfg(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_audio_src)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1126   {
000002  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000004  460e              MOV      r6,r1
;;;1127   	UINT8 u8_i;
;;;1128   	for(u8_i = 0; u8_i < 4; u8_i++)
000006  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000008  e006              B        |L2.24|
                  |L2.10|
;;;1129   	{
;;;1130   		app_tx_audio_cfg(u8Dev,u8_audio_src, u8_i);
00000a  4622              MOV      r2,r4
00000c  4631              MOV      r1,r6
00000e  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000010  f7fffffe          BL       app_tx_audio_cfg
000014  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;1128
000016  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;1128
                  |L2.24|
000018  2c04              CMP      r4,#4                 ;1128
00001a  dbf6              BLT      |L2.10|
;;;1131   	}
;;;1132   }
00001c  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;1133   VOID splicer_video_mute(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_path, BOOL b_mute)
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i._splicer_mode_cfg||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  _splicer_mode_cfg PROC

;;;415    static VOID _splicer_mode_cfg(UINT8 u8Dev,SPLICER_APP_T *pst_app_splicer_dev)
000000  b503              PUSH     {r0,r1,lr}
;;;416    {
000002  b083              SUB      sp,sp,#0xc
;;;417    	get_sdn_memsize_min(u8Dev);
000004  9803              LDR      r0,[sp,#0xc]
000006  f7fffffe          BL       get_sdn_memsize_min
;;;418    	switch(pst_app_splicer_dev->u8_splicer_mode)
00000a  9804              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x10]
00000c  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]
00000e  2807              CMP      r0,#7
000010  f0838049          BCS.W    |L3.12454|
000014  e8dff010          TBH      [pc,r0,LSL #1]
000018  04680e44          DCW      0x0468,0x0e44
00001c  06b31090          DCW      0x06b3,0x1090
000020  000709d4          DCW      0x0007,0x09d4
000024  13d6              DCW      0x13d6
;;;419    	{
;;;420    //		case SPLICER_MODE_1X1:
;;;421    //			pst_app_splicer_dev->tSdn_MemSize.u16_h = return_minof_three(pst_app_splicer_dev->tSdn_InSize.u16_h, g_u16_splicer_memsize_min[u8Dev].u16_h, MEMORY_4K_H_SIZE_MAX);
;;;422    //			pst_app_splicer_dev->tSdn_MemSize.u16_v = return_minof_three(pst_app_splicer_dev->tSdn_InSize.u16_v, g_u16_splicer_memsize_min[u8Dev].u16_v, MEMORY_4K_V_SIZE_MAX);

;;;424    //			if(pst_app_splicer_dev->tSdn_InSize.u16_v > pst_app_splicer_dev->tSdn_MemSize.u16_v && pst_app_splicer_dev->tSdn_MemSize.u16_h > 2048)

;;;437    //			mculib_delay_ms(50);
;;;438    //
;;;439    //			pst_app_splicer_dev->st_winborder[0].left = 0;

                          AREA ||i.app_splicer_osd_init||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_splicer_osd_init PROC
;;;1521   
;;;1522   VOID app_splicer_osd_init(UINT8 u8Dev)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1523   {
000002  4605              MOV      r5,r0
;;;1524   	UINT8 u8_idx = 0;
000004  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;1525   	for(u8_idx = 0; u8_idx < 4; u8_idx ++)
000006  bf00              NOP      
000008  e02c              B        |L15.100|
                  |L15.10|
;;;1526   	{
;;;1527   		g_st_misc_osd_mux[u8Dev][u8_idx].b_enable = MS_TRUE;
00000a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00000c  eb050145          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #1
000010  4a16              LDR      r2,|L15.108|
000012  eb020181          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #2
000016  eb040244          ADD      r2,r4,r4,LSL #1
00001a  5488              STRB     r0,[r1,r2]
;;;1528   		g_st_misc_osd_mux[u8Dev][u8_idx].u8_osd_module = g_u8_misc_osd_idx[u8_idx];
00001c  4814              LDR      r0,|L15.112|
00001e  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
000020  eb050145          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #1
000024  4a11              LDR      r2,|L15.108|
000026  eb020181          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #2
00002a  eb040244          ADD      r2,r4,r4,LSL #1
00002e  4411              ADD      r1,r1,r2
000030  7048              STRB     r0,[r1,#1]
;;;1529   		g_st_misc_osd_mux[u8Dev][u8_idx].u8_tx_module = g_u8_misc_module_tx[g_u8_HDMI_TX_PROT[u8_idx]];
000032  4810              LDR      r0,|L15.116|
000034  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
000036  4910              LDR      r1,|L15.120|
000038  5c08              LDRB     r0,[r1,r0]
00003a  eb050145          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #1
00003e  4a0b              LDR      r2,|L15.108|
000040  eb020181          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #2
000044  eb040244          ADD      r2,r4,r4,LSL #1
000048  4411              ADD      r1,r1,r2
00004a  7088              STRB     r0,[r1,#2]
;;;1530   		api_misc_osd_timing_mux_cfg(&g_st_misc_osd_mux[u8Dev][u8_idx]);
00004c  eb050145          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #1
000050  4a06              LDR      r2,|L15.108|
000052  eb020181          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #2
000056  eb040244          ADD      r2,r4,r4,LSL #1
00005a  1888              ADDS     r0,r1,r2
00005c  f7fffffe          BL       api_misc_osd_timing_mux_cfg
000060  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;1525
000062  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;1525
                  |L15.100|
000064  2c04              CMP      r4,#4                 ;1525
000066  dbd0              BLT      |L15.10|
;;;1531   	}
;;;1532   }
000068  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;1533   
                          ENDP

00006a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L15.108|
                          DCD      g_st_misc_osd_mux
                  |L15.112|
                          DCD      g_u8_misc_osd_idx
                  |L15.116|
                          DCD      g_u8_HDMI_TX_PROT
                  |L15.120|
                          DCD      g_u8_misc_module_tx

                          AREA ||i.app_splicer_output_resolution||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_splicer_output_resolution PROC
;;;1202   
;;;1203   VOID app_splicer_output_resolution(UINT8 u8Dev,SPLICER_APP_T *pst_app_splicer_dev)
000000  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;1204   {
000002  b089              SUB      sp,sp,#0x24
000004  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
;;;1205   	UINT8 i=0;
000008  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;1206   	PLL_DEV_T         st_pll_dev;
;;;1207   	MISC_MODULE_CLK_T st_module_clk;
;;;1208   	VDS_TMG_DEV_T     st_splicer_timgen_dev;
;;;1209   	SS_DEV_T          st_vopss_ss_dev;
;;;1210   
;;;1211   	for(i = 0 ; i < 4 ; i ++)
00000a  bf00              NOP      
00000c  e17d              B        |L16.778|
                  |L16.14|
;;;1212   	{
;;;1213           UINT8 l_u8VIC = g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][i].st_infoframes_packets.st_avi_infoframe.u8_video_code;

000012  ebc01045          RSB      r0,r0,r5,LSL #5
000016  49c4              LDR      r1,|L16.808|
000018  eb011000          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #4
00001c  eb040144          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #1
000020  ebc11144          RSB      r1,r1,r4,LSL #5
000024  eb000081          ADD      r0,r0,r1,LSL #2
000028  f890702f          LDRB     r7,[r0,#0x2f]
;;;1214   
;;;1215   		if(g_u8_output_index_bak[u8Dev][i] == g_u8_output_index[u8Dev][i])
00002c  48bf              LDR      r0,|L16.812|
00002e  eb000085          ADD      r0,r0,r5,LSL #2
000032  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
000034  49be              LDR      r1,|L16.816|
000036  eb010185          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #2
00003a  5d09              LDRB     r1,[r1,r4]
00003c  4288              CMP      r0,r1
00003e  d100              BNE      |L16.66|
;;;1216   			continue;
000040  e161              B        |L16.774|
                  |L16.66|
;;;1217   
;;;1218   		if(i == 2 && (pst_app_splicer_dev->u8_splicer_mode >= SPLICER_MODE_1X2 && pst_app_splicer_dev->u8_splicer_mode <= SPLICER_MODE_2X1))
000042  2c02              CMP      r4,#2
000044  d106              BNE      |L16.84|
000046  7830              LDRB     r0,[r6,#0]
000048  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00004a  db03              BLT      |L16.84|
00004c  7830              LDRB     r0,[r6,#0]
00004e  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000050  dc00              BGT      |L16.84|
;;;1219   			continue;
000052  e158              B        |L16.774|
                  |L16.84|
;;;1220   
;;;1221   		if(i == 3 && (pst_app_splicer_dev->u8_splicer_mode >= SPLICER_MODE_1X2 && pst_app_splicer_dev->u8_splicer_mode <= SPLICER_MODE_3X1))

000056  d106              BNE      |L16.102|
000058  7830              LDRB     r0,[r6,#0]
00005a  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00005c  db03              BLT      |L16.102|
00005e  7830              LDRB     r0,[r6,#0]
000060  2803              CMP      r0,#3
000062  dc00              BGT      |L16.102|
;;;1222   			continue;
000064  e14f              B        |L16.774|
                  |L16.102|
;;;1223   
;;;1224   		_splicer_video_freeze(u8Dev,g_u8_splicer_vipss_sel[u8Dev]);

000068  5d41              LDRB     r1,[r0,r5]
00006a  4628              MOV      r0,r5
00006c  f7fffffe          BL       _splicer_video_freeze
;;;1225   
;;;1226   		api_hdmi_tx_output_en(&g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][i], MS_FALSE);
000070  eb050145          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #1
000074  ebc11145          RSB      r1,r1,r5,LSL #5
000078  4aab              LDR      r2,|L16.808|
